data.title: Dealership Buy/Sell Market Set New Record in 2025 as Consolidation Accelerated and Blue Sky Values Rose
data.description: In Incline Village, Nevada, the auto dealership buy/sell market achieved a new milestone in 2025 with a total of 458 transactions, involving the sale of 688 franchises. This marked a 5% growth compared to the previous year. The recently published 2025 Blue Sky Report® by Kerrigan Advisors revealed that ongoing buyer interest, robust earnings, and a persistent trend of consolidation were key factors behind the heightened activity in the buy/sell market. As a result, blue sky values in 2025 soared. Notably, within the last five years, the US saw over 3,500 franchise transactions, underscoring the industry's buoyant performance.

data.title: What's Going On With Palantir Shares On Tuesday?
data.description: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) stocks are experiencing a decrease during Tuesday's premarket trading session due to a decrease in risk appetite in the equities market. Nasdaq futures are down by 0.22% and S&P 500 futures have dropped by 0.25%. The Technology sector is slightly lower, putting pressure on high-multiple AI software companies. The decline comes after a recent rally in Palantir stock driven by positive geopolitical developments and a significant military contract announcement. President Donald Trump's decision to halt planned U.S. strikes for five days contributed to the market's recovery. Trump's positive discussions with Iranian officials, described as "very good and productive" on Truth Social, eased tensions following a weekend ultimatum concerning the Strait of Hormuz. Furthermore, the Pentagon is set to officially adopt Palantir's Maven Smart System following a directive issued by Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg on March 9, providing the company with long-term funding stability.

data.title: HP Imagine 2026: HP Introduces LaserJet Portfolio with Quantum-Resistant Security and Faster Document Digitization
data.description: With printer management proving to be a challenge for 78% of small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs) and 54% of organizations advocating for quicker digitization, HP has introduced a new LaserJet lineup. This portfolio boasts a 50% increase in document processing speed, enhanced security features, and artificial intelligence tools tailored for hybrid work environments.

data.title: Eckhart Tolle Launches Eckhart Tolle Now: A Major Evolution of His Global Community, with Live Teachings and the Only Official Eckhart AI
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Louisville, Colorado, Eckhart Tolle, a renowned spiritual teacher, is celebrated globally for his impactful teachings. His books, The Power of Now and A New Earth, have been translated into 52 languages, reaching millions worldwide. Tolle's influence transcends borders and languages, making him a leading figure in the spiritual community.

data.title: CHICAGO JEWISH ALLIANCE LAUNCHES PROJECT AHAVA TO SECURE HOLOCAUST SURVIVOR SAFE HOUSING FOR FIVE YEARS
data.description: U.S. Holocaust Remembrance Day falls on April 14, with the Chicago Jewish Alliance announcing Project Ahava on March 24, 2026. The initiative aims to support 86-year-old Holocaust Survivor Sami Steigmann by raising funds for safe and stable housing. Sami currently resides alone in Harlem, highlighting the organization's commitment to ensuring his well-being.

data.title: Power and Paradox: Value of Leading US Brands Rises to $6.44 Trillion as Global Trust Weakens
data.description: In 2026, the United States maintains its position as the leading global brand market, with the total value of the nation's top 500 brands reaching $6.44 trillion, marking a 10% increase from the previous year. According to a recent report from Brand Finance, technology giants Apple saw a 6% increase in brand value to $607.6 billion, Microsoft rose by 23% to $565.2 billion, and Google increased by 5% to $433.1 billion, consolidating America's digital dominance. Despite this success, the report highlights a notable paradox: U.S. corporations must address certain challenges to maintain their competitiveness.

data.title: Quantiphi Recognized in HFS Challenger Series for Advancing Services-as-Software™ Delivery Model
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Quantiphi, a company based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, was recognized in the HFS Challenger Series for its implementation of the Services-as-Software™ (SaS) model using its Technology Services-as-a-Software (TSaaS) framework. This acknowledgement highlights Quantiphi's expertise in AI-focused digital engineering.

data.title: Andersen Consulting Enters into a Collaboration Agreement with Ventum Consulting
data.description: San Francisco-based Andersen Consulting has recently broadened its worldwide reach by incorporating Ventum Consulting into its network. This collaboration has significantly expanded Andersen Consulting's global platform, allowing them to reach a wider audience and provide enhanced services across various regions.

data.title: As AI Skills Become the Hardest to Find, ManpowerGroup Launches 2026 VivaTech Startup Challenge: "Human First, Digital Always"
data.description: A recent worldwide competition has been announced, calling on startups to create AI-driven workforce solutions that empower individuals. The event was launched in Milwaukee on March 24, 2026. With the rapid integration of artificial intelligence by companies, the need for employees proficient in AI has surpassed that of engineering and conventional roles. This challenge aims to address this issue and find innovative ways to incorporate AI into the workforce.

data.title: In HelloNation, Chiropractic Expert Dr. Holly Potter Shares Five Habits to Prevent Neck and Shoulder Pain
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Rochester, New York, Dr. Holly Potter from Align Chiropractic shared insights in an article on reducing the risk of neck and shoulder pain. The article suggests five daily habits that can support spinal health and ease muscle strain. By incorporating these strategies, individuals may lower their chances of developing such discomfort. This information is aimed at promoting a healthier lifestyle and potentially reducing the number of people experiencing neck and shoulder pain.

data.title: Doctronic Raises $40M Series B Following Breakthrough as First AI to Legally Renew Prescriptions in the U.S.
data.description: A company based in New York, Doctronic, has recently secured $40 million in Series B funding. This funding comes after a significant milestone achieved by the company as it became the first AI-powered platform legally authorized to renew prescriptions in the United States.

data.title: Consumers Don't Fully Trust AI--Yet Nearly Half Would Use it for Cyber Security Help
data.description: A recent study by F-Secure reveals a concerning lack of trust among consumers regarding AI tools, with a significant number expressing skepticism. However, there is a notable chance for digital service providers to offer AI-driven security solutions that could instill confidence in users. The research, released in Helsinki on March 24, 2026, underscores the need for improved consumer trust in AI technology, as only a small percentage of individuals currently feel at ease with its use in digital services.
